texto: Sorry, that's unfair. Let me warn you. I want you to follow, because no matter what you think you might know, we will always be one step, three steps- seven steps ahead of you, and just when you think you're catching up, that's when we'll be right behind you. And at no time will you be anywhere other than exactly where I want you to be because the closer you think you are, the less you'll actually see.
explicacao: Citação de J Daniel Atlas sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Sorry, that's unfair. Let me warn you. I want you to follow, because no matter what you think you…” articula reflexao, magic, think em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
